Document:
# Core Rule 6 - No ban discussion or evasion [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2025-10-11[/italic][/color]
This is a zero tolerance rule.
You may discuss bans only at https://forum.spacestation14.com/c/ban-appeals/appeals-game/40
Unless you are completing existing antagonist objectives, do not act as or accept banned jobs and roles.
A ban evasion penalty applies to all accounts if you connect to the server with another account while banned.
## Examples [color=#449944]Appropriate:[/color] - Refusing promotion to or door access for Head of Security while banned from security or command roles. - Suiciding or spectating after revolutionary conversion while banned from revolutionary roles.
[color=#994444]Prohibited:[/color] - Accepting promotion to or door access for Head of Security while banned from security or command roles. - Playing as a revolutionary while banned from revolutionary roles.
